resources.string: • Geometry studies shapes and space. \n • Points, lines, and planes are basic ideas. \n • Figures are made of points and follow axioms and theorems.
• Through two points passes one line. \n • Distance is always positive or zero. \n • Triangle sides obey the triangle inequality.
• Proofs show how distances relate in triangles. \n • Example: ∣AC∣≥∣AB∣−∣BC∣ and ∣AC∣<∣AB∣+∣BC∣ for non-collinear points.
• A segment joins two endpoints. \n • A ray starts at one point and goes on endlessly. \n • Angles, polygons, and circles are key geometric figures.
• A line divides a plane into two parts. \n • Vertical angles are equal. \n • The sum of adjacent angles equals 180°.
